title: Reminder don't Work
excerpt:
Hi everyone. 
I wanted to set a Reminder for 9 AM when: 
 

a certain date arrives (dedicated deadline field)
there is a specific situation (dedicated State field)

 
I set it as from images … But no communication starts…

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone.

I wanted to set a Reminder for 9 AM when:

FireShot Capture 141 - monday - Monitoraggio Junior - https___abitat-sit.monday.com_boards_283723809.png844×121 8.91 KB

  • a certain date arrives (dedicated deadline field)
  • there is a specific situation (dedicated State field)

Screenshot 2019-09-11 15.16.20.png1022×356 22.1 KB

I set it as from images … But no communication starts from Monday … Even if all Notifications are active!

What am I doing wrong??

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
Who is “Com” ? a user or a team?

posts.author: Krishele (Krishele Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you set it before 9a today? I’ve found that sometimes I create an automation on the day and the time is for earlier than when I created so either adjust it to the future to confirm it works or wait until the next day.

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml: The automation was created yesterday and potentially had to send alerts already this morning at 9 AM.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AleRun

Can you please drop us more information to support@monday.com?

This sounds like a potential bug so we’d like to investigate it through our regular support channels

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julia-monday.com.
I am already writing with the Support Team yesterday but unfortunately, for now, we have not yet solved.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: If you wrote to them they will definitely be dealing with it. Just make sure to answer any requests for further info which they might need to open a bug report with our developers!

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml: So I’m doing it!
